summary: Completed testing of iPad and Student edit functionality in detail views. All PUT endpoints and frontend edit modes working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test iPads and students during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: iPad and Student edit functionality fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_ipad_student_update.py cover all CRUD operations and name/ITNr propagation.

tests: Update all fields (itnr, snr, karton, pencil, typ, ansch_jahr, ausleihe_datum, status)
ITNr change propagates to assignments and contracts
Update personal data (sus_vorn, sus_nachn, sus_kl, sus_geb, sus_str_hnr, sus_plz, sus_ort)
Update guardian 1 data (erz1_vorn, erz1_nachn, erz1_str_hnr, erz1_plz, erz1_ort)
Update guardian 2 data (erz2_vorn, erz2_nachn, erz2_str_hnr, erz2_plz, erz2_ort)
Name change propagates to assignments and contracts

features_verified: Edit mode shows editable input fields for all iPad properties
Speichern (Save) button saves changes and shows success toast
Abbrechen (Cancel) button discards changes and exits edit mode
Edit mode shows editable input fields for personal data
Edit mode shows editable input fields for both guardians (Erziehungsberechtigte 1 & 2)
Speichern (Save) button saves changes and shows success toast
Abbrechen (Cancel) button discards changes and exits edit mode

rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. All requested features (iPad edit, Student edit, name/ITNr propagation) are implemented correctly.
